projectDescription: A two-player browser-based dice game where players roll to accumulate points, balancing greed and patience to be the first to reach 100.
keyFeatures: Visual dice face rendering with dot patterns for each number 1–6
Current score accumulation per turn with risk/reward hold mechanic
Global score tracking across rounds until a player reaches 100
Rolling a 1 immediately ends the current player's turn and resets their current score
Responsive layout for both mobile and desktop (1280px+ breakpoint)
Warm wood-tone gradient background with clean card UI
Express.js static file server for easy local hosting
publicApiSurface: beginGame() — resets all scores and starts a new game with Player 1's turn
generateRandomFace() — rolls the dice, updates current score, and advances turn on a roll of 1
handleHoldScore() — saves the current player's score to global and passes the turn
showDiceFaceGenerated() — renders the correct dot pattern on the dice UI element
generateRandomInt(min, max) — utility returning a random integer in [min, max)
keepRoundScore(cs) — updates the current-score display and handles turn loss on 1
keepGlobalScore(cs, gs, player) — commits current score to global and checks for win condition
checkDotPlayerPosition() — returns which player currently holds the active-turn indicator
